meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Firma.dev
products.tagline: E-signatures API for your app averaging ~3¢ per envelope
products.summaryZh: 为您的应用提供电子签名API，平均每份约3美分
products.descriptionZh: 每份信封0.029欧元（约3美分），Firma.dev的价格比DocuSign便宜约99%，后者每份信封费用高达4-5美元。按用量付费，无最低消费，无合约。专为初创企业和SaaS团队打造，以开发者优先——他们更愿意花一个下午集成签署功能，而非经历冗长的销售流程：提供简洁的REST API、可嵌入的模板和签署编辑器，数小时内即可完成集成。使用沙箱密钥免费测试所有功能，包括真实文档和无限制使用，无需支付任何费用。获取API密钥，立即开始构建。
products.description: At €0.029 per envelope (about 3¢), Firma.dev runs about 99% cheaper than DocuSign, where one envelope can cost $4-5. Pay-as-you-go, no minimums, no contracts. Built developer-first for startups and SaaS teams who'd rather integrate signing in an afternoon than sit through a sales cycle: clean REST API, embeddable template and signing editors, integration in hours. Test everything free with a sandbox key, real docs and unlimited usage, before you pay a cent. Get an API key and start building.

products.name: Qursor
products.tagline: Point at any UI to send exact context to your AI
products.summaryZh: 指向任意界面，即可将精确上下文发送给你的AI。
products.descriptionZh:
我一直在浪费AI代币，向那些编辑错误元素的智能体描述UI变更。于是我做了Qursor。指向任意元素，复制结构化上下文（选择器、类名、样式、字体、颜色），粘贴到你的AI智能体中。不再需要模糊的截图，不再浪费额度。  
- 检查字体、颜色、间距  
- 复制AI可用的元素上下文  
- 提取组件为HTML/CSS/JSX  
- 取色器和字体检测器  
- 从任意页面下载资源
products.description: I kept wasting AI tokens describing UI changes to agents that edited the wrong element. So I built Qursor. Point at any element, copy structured context (selectors, classes, styles, fonts, colors), paste into your AI agent. No vague screenshots. No burned credits. - Inspect fonts, colors, spacing - Copy AI-ready element context - Extract components as HTML/CSS/JSX - Color picker and font detector - Download assets from any page

products.name: Pond
products.tagline: Fundraising, GTM, and bounties for startups
products.summaryZh: 初创公司的融资、市场推广与赏金计划
products.descriptionZh:
Pond是新创经济的基础设施。经过验证的创始人可以在一个平台上筹集资金、获取客户，并触达超过20,000名贡献者。  
· 市场：Stripe验证的指标 + Vault保护的融资。一家初创公司在3分钟内筹集了15万美元。  
· 赏金：超过10,000份提交，发放超过36,000美元。合作方包括Ethereum Foundation、GPTZero、PhotoBase。  
· AI增长代理：CRM、销售管道和GTM自动化。400多家初创公司 · 覆盖154个国家 · 投资方包括Archetype和Coinbase Ventures。
products.description: Pond is the market infrastructure for the new startup economy. Verified founders raise capital, acquire customers, and access 20,000+ contributors in one place. · Markets: Stripe-verified metrics + Vault-protected funding. One startup raised $150K in 3 minutes. · Bounties: 10,000+ submissions, $36K+ distributed. Ethereum Foundation, GPTZero, PhotoBase. · AI Growth Agent: CRM, pipeline, and GTM on autopilot. 400+ startups · 154 countries · Archetype & Coinbase Ventures.

products.name: HyperSleep
products.tagline: Block social media until you've actually slept
products.summaryZh: 在真正入睡前屏蔽社交媒体。
products.descriptionZh: 所有屏幕时间管理应用都因同一个原因失败：你必须手动开启它，而凌晨1点时你不会这么做。HyperSleep颠覆了这一逻辑。你的社交应用将保持锁定状态，直到多传感器检测确认你确实入睡。它会在就寝时自动启动，完全在设备端运行，将“少刷手机”从意志力问题转变为可实现的成果。仅限安卓系统。
products.description: Every screen-time app fails for the same reason: you have to turn it on and at 1am, you won't. HyperSleep flips it. Your social apps stay locked until multi-sensor detection verifies you actually slept. It auto-starts at bedtime, runs 100% on-device, and turns "scroll less" from willpower into an outcome you earn. Android.

products.name: Bob's CLI
products.tagline: A local-first AI coding CLI that adapts to you
products.summaryZh: 本地优先的AI编码命令行工具，适应你的需求
products.descriptionZh: Bob's CLI 运行于你的自有硬件，零 API 成本，零数据离开你的机器。Bob 驻留在你的终端中，能查看你的实际文件，且仅在获得你明确许可后才编写代码。其独特之处在于：自动检测本地 AI 模型、适应你工作方式的行为 DNA 分析、自主代码审查与自动修复、对话分支、深度探索，以及 SovereignLink——可从任何设备远程执行，而你的代码始终留在家中。免费起步。主权设计。
products.description: Bob's CLI runs on your own hardware with zero API costs, zero data leaving your machine. Bob lives in your terminal, sees your actual files, and writes code only with your explicit approval. What makes it different: auto-detect local AI models, behavioral DNA profiling that adapts to how YOU work, autonomous code review + auto-fix, conversation forking, deep dives, and SovereignLink — remote execution from any device while your code stays home. Free to start. Sovereign by design.

products.name: Meet Warren 3.0
products.tagline: Your voice-supported AI financial planning partner
products.summaryZh: 待翻译：Your voice-supported AI financial planning partner
products.descriptionZh: 一次语音对话。免费财务规划。我们打造Warren，是因为对于资产未达六位数的人来说，财务规划形同虚设。独立财务顾问收费200英镑/小时。电子表格会过时。通用应用只会告诉你已知的信息。Warren为你展示两种未来：不作为的结果，以及行动带来的改变。随后Warren会提供一系列后续步骤，追踪你的进展，并根据经济变化监控你的计划。加入3000多名已在用Warren的英国人。10分钟即可开始。
products.description: One voice conversation. Free financial plan. We built Warren because financial planning was broken for anyone without a six-figure portfolio. IFAs charge £200/hr. Spreadsheets go stale. Generic apps tell you what you already know. Warren shows you two futures: what happens if you do nothing and what changes if you act. Then Warren gives you a set of next steps, tracks your progress, and monitors your plan against economic changes. Join 3K+ Brits already using Warren. 10 mins to start.

products.name: ShellMate
products.tagline: Manage SSH servers, credentials, and teams in one place
products.summaryZh: 在一个地方管理SSH服务器、凭据和团队。
products.descriptionZh: 待翻译：ShellMate is a modern SSH workspace with native terminal sessions, permission-aware team access, server-managed encrypted credentials, and auditable connection controls.
products.description: ShellMate is a modern SSH workspace with native terminal sessions, permission-aware team access, server-managed encrypted credentials, and auditable connection controls.

products.name: Insta360 Luna Ultra
products.tagline: A gimbal camera that sees with you
products.summaryZh: 与你同视角的云台相机
products.descriptionZh: Insta360 Luna Ultra 是一款8K云台相机，配备1英寸徕卡Summicron主镜头、1/1.3英寸长焦镜头、三轴稳定系统、可拆卸2英寸OLED触摸屏、AI追踪、10位I-Log、内置存储及POV拍摄配件。
products.description: Insta360 Luna Ultra is an 8K gimbal camera with a 1" Leica Summicron main lens, 1/1.3" telephoto lens, 3-axis stabilization, detachable 2" OLED touchscreen, AI tracking, 10-bit I-Log, built-in storage, and POV shooting accessories.

products.name: Slack Data Agent
products.tagline: Ask about your data without leaving Slack
products.summaryZh: 无需离开Slack即可查询您的数据
products.descriptionZh: Basedash for Slack 是 Slack 内的人工智能数据分析师——现已上架官方 Slack Marketplace。在任何频道中提及 @Basedash，它便会查询你的真实数据源，在线程中思考，并在团队讨论处直接回复答案和图表。自动化功能可将定时报告发送至你的频道，洞察功能会自动呈现异常情况——图表一并包含在内。在 Slack 中提问，由你的数据作答。
products.description: Basedash for Slack is your AI data analyst inside Slack — now in the official Slack Marketplace. Mention @Basedash in any channel and it queries your real data sources, thinks in the thread, and replies with an answer and a chart, right where your team is talking. Automations deliver scheduled reports to your channels, and insights surface anomalies automatically — charts included. Ask in Slack. Answered by your data.

products.name: CueBuddy
products.tagline: Record talking videos without manual scrolling
products.summaryZh: 无需手动翻页，即可录制讲解视频。
products.descriptionZh: CueBuddy 是一款适用于 iPhone 和 iPad 的语音跟随提词器。它能根据你的说话节奏自动滚动脚本，让创作者无需手动控制滚动速度，即可录制口播视频、课程、演讲和 vlog。当你暂停时，脚本随之暂停；当你继续时，它也会继续滚动。你可以在网页演示中体验核心功能，或使用 iOS 应用获得更完整的录制工作流。
products.description: CueBuddy is a voice-following teleprompter for iPhone and iPad. It scrolls your script as you speak, so creators can record talking videos, courses, speeches, and vlogs without manually controlling the scrolling speed. When you pause, the script pauses. When you continue, it keeps moving. You can try the core experience in the web demo or use the iOS app for a more complete recording workflow.

products.name: LocIn AI
products.tagline: Localize your app with tone-aware AI, automated workflows
products.summaryZh: 使用语调感知AI与自动化工作流，本地化您的应用
products.descriptionZh: 使用语气感知AI、自动化本地化工作流、CLI集成和即时API访问来翻译您的应用。在全球发布的同时，确保品牌语调在每种语言中保持一致。
products.description: Translate your app with tone-aware AI, automated localization workflows, CLI integration, and instant API access. Launch globally while keeping your brand voice consistent across every language.

products.name: NODUS PH Radar for Product Hunt
products.tagline: Product Hunt analytics beyond the daily leaderboard
products.summaryZh: 超越每日排行榜的Product Hunt分析
products.descriptionZh: NODUS PH Radar 帮助创作者分析 Product Hunt 发布数据，超越每日排名。探索发布速度、竞争动态、关注规则、社区聚焦机会、历史模式以及即将排期的发布。在发布日之前获取背景信息，理解驱动可见性与参与度的因素。
products.description: NODUS PH Radar helps makers analyze Product Hunt launches beyond the daily rankings. Explore launch velocity, race dynamics, watch rules, community spotlight opportunities, historical patterns, and upcoming scheduled launches. Gain context before launch day and understand what drives visibility and engagement.

products.name: pleNx — Plex client for Nintendo Switch
products.tagline: The first native Plex client for Nintendo Switch
products.summaryZh: 首个原生Plex客户端登陆Nintendo Switch
products.descriptionZh: pleNx 是一款免费、开源的 Nintendo Switch 原生 Plex 客户端。支持浏览服务器、管理观看列表、以原始画质下载离线内容，并通过 MPV 播放——可在掌机模式或连接任意电视的底座模式下使用。
products.description: pleNx is a free, open-source, native Plex client for the Nintendo Switch. Browse your server, queue your watchlist, download for offline in original quality, and play with MPV — handheld or docked on any TV.

products.name: QACAT
products.tagline: Catch translation issues before your users do
products.summaryZh: 在用户发现之前，捕捉翻译问题。
products.descriptionZh: QACAT 是一个混合型翻译质量保证平台，结合了自动规则检查、AI 分析和专家人工审核。上传截图并在真实产品界面中审阅翻译——内置 OCR 可自动提取文本。每次运行都会生成结构化的评分报告，包含严重程度分类和 AI 总结的待修正内容。支持 100 多种语言。由 Alconost 提供技术支持。
products.description: QACAT is a hybrid translation QA platform combining automated rule checks, AI analysis, and expert human review. Upload screenshots and review translations in real product UI — built-in OCR pulls the text for you. Every run gives a structured, scored report with severity breakdowns and an AI summary of what to fix. Works across 100+ languages. Powered by Alconost.

products.name: LeadPrysm
products.tagline: Every newly funded AI startup - with contacts
products.summaryZh: 每一个新获得融资的AI初创公司——附联系人
products.descriptionZh: LeadPrysm追踪10个子垂直领域内所有新获融资的AI初创公司，并将每轮融资转化为完整档案：创始人及高管联系方式、投资者、融资历史、招聘信号和市场背景。每周更新。
products.description: LeadPrysm tracks every newly funded AI startup across 10 sub-verticals and turns each raise into a full profile: founder & exec contacts, investors, funding history, hiring signals, and market context. Refreshed weekly.

products.name: KOSH Money
products.tagline: USD account & credit cards for freelancers & creators
products.summaryZh: 自由职业者和创作者的美元账户与信用卡
products.descriptionZh: KOSH 是一款专为亚洲自由职业者和创作者打造的美元账户。与Wise或Payoneer不同——后者在多个亚洲国家常限制或延迟美元收款——KOSH让你能直接从Upwork和全球客户处收款，可靠持有美元余额，并使用信用卡消费，无需设立美国实体。早期用户反馈显示，他们能更快获取收入，且付款被拒情况更少。
products.description: KOSH is a USD account built specifically for freelancers and creators across Asia. Unlike Wise or Payoneer, which often restrict or delay USD receiving in many Asian countries, KOSH lets you receive payments directly from Upwork and global clients, hold USD balances reliably, and spend with a credit card - without needing a US entity. Early users report faster access to their earnings and fewer payment rejections.

products.name: Tide
products.tagline: Layered voice notes that paint themselves
products.summaryZh: 分层语音笔记，自动绘制呈现。
products.descriptionZh: Tide 将语音备忘录转化为层次分明的声音草图。将音轨叠加到同一卷磁带上——哼一段低音线，在上面加入人声节拍，再唱出副歌。波形会随着你的录制自动绘制。像黑胶唱片一样滑动浏览，循环播放精彩片段，发送到 Choppa 或你的数字音频工作站。无需订阅，无需云端。首发月——七月底前五折优惠！
products.description: Tide turns voice memos into layered sound sketches. Takes stack onto one tape — hum a bassline, beatbox over it, sing the hook. The waveform paints itself as you record. Scrub like vinyl, loop the good part, send it to Choppa or your DAW. No subs, no cloud. Launch month — 50% off until the end of July!

products.name: Medicyn
products.tagline: Your complete medical history privately on your device
products.summaryZh: 你的完整病史，私密存储于你的设备中。
products.descriptionZh: 唯一完全私密保存医疗记录的健康应用——数据存于你的设备，离线可用，无需账户，无追踪。存储完整健康档案：病史、用药、处方、过敏、化验报告、手术记录等。AI扫描文档、追踪症状、设置提醒，最多可管理6位家庭成员。7天免费试用，之后一次付费永久使用——无订阅、无广告。你的健康，你的数据，你的掌控。
products.description: The only health app that keeps your medical history completely private—on your device, offline, with no accounts or tracking. Store your complete health record: conditions, medications, prescriptions, allergies, lab reports, surgeries, and more. Scan documents with AI, track symptoms, set reminders, and manage up to 6 family members. 7-day free trial. Then pay once, use forever—no subscriptions, no ads. Your health. Your data. Your control.

products.name: Clutch Alarm
products.tagline: Sleep through the night. Wake up for the goals.
products.summaryZh: 整夜安睡，醒来为梦想而战。
products.descriptionZh: 世界杯在北美举行，欧洲球迷看重要比赛得凌晨3点爬起来。Clutch Alarm实时追踪每场直播，只在值得的时刻——进球、一球定胜负、主队陷入危机——用最大音量、全屏弹窗、无视静音模式把你叫醒。0-0的上半场安心睡，精彩时刻再醒来。就算你醒着，它也会在重大瞬间发生的瞬间推送提醒——让你一个都不错过。最初是NBA闹钟，现在也覆盖足球了。
products.description: The World Cup is in North America, so for fans in Europe the big matches kick off at 3 AM. Clutch Alarm watches every live match and only wakes you — loud, full-screen, past silent mode — when it's worth it: a goal, a one-goal finish, your team in trouble. Sleep through the 0-0 first halves; wake up for the drama. And even if you're awake, it pings you the second a big moment happens — so you never miss one. Started as an NBA alarm, now covers football too.

products.name: Keep
products.tagline: Full-screen 3D clock scenes for your iPhone or Mac
products.summaryZh: 适用于iPhone或Mac的全屏3D时钟场景
products.descriptionZh: 默认时钟看腻了？Keep 把你的 iPhone 和 Mac 变成精美的 3D 环境时钟显示。在 iPhone 上，可配合苹果内置的快捷指令自动化，用作待机风格的充电显示；在 Mac 上，则能用动态环境时钟替代静态屏保。主题涵盖全息、玻璃、果冻、线框、矩阵及液态变形等风格，专为融入你的桌面而设计。
products.description: The default clock got boring. Keep transforms your iPhone and Mac into beautiful 3D ambient clock displays. Use it as a StandBy-style charging display on iPhone with Apple's built-in Shortcuts automation, or replace static screensavers on Mac with animated ambient clocks. Featuring holographic, glass, jelly, wireframe, matrix and morphing liquid-inspired themes designed to become part of your setup.
